to do today.

A voice-first daily companion that guides you through concussion recovery — from symptoms to stage clearance — without replacing your doctor.

Try the app demo →

No subscription. Pay once, keep forever. · Complement your doctor, not replace them.

"My doctor told me to rest. That was the only instruction I got."

After a concussion, most people go home with no guidance on what to actually do each day. No protocol. No way to track progress. No one to ask at 11pm when symptoms spike. That's the gap Headway fills.

Real experiences

You're not alone in this

We talked to people who've been through it. Here's what they wished they'd had.

"I didn't even know I had a concussion for two weeks. I just thought it was a bad headache. No one explained what to look for."

TK
Tyler K.
Non-athlete, 24

"Being sidelined was harder than any physical symptom. I felt completely out of control — and I didn't know that was normal."

MP
Marcus P.
College athlete

"It took 3 months to figure out I also had whiplash. No trainer, no protocol. I was just guessing the whole time."

SC
Sam C.
Non-athlete, 31

"My coach didn't believe me because I looked fine. The symptom export from this app is what finally convinced him."

JR
Jessica R.
High school athlete
What's inside

Everything you need.
Nothing you don't.

Built specifically for the part of recovery that happens at home — not in the clinic.

🎙️

Voice-first check-ins

Too brain-foggy to type? Just tap and speak. Headway logs your symptoms, mood, and sleep without straining your recovery.

📈

Recovery tracking

See your progress as a rising score over time — not just a list of symptoms. Proof that things are actually getting better.

🗺️

6-stage protocol

The evidence-based return-to-activity protocol, broken down into plain language with a clear daily focus for each stage.

🧘

Mental health support

Breathing exercises, coping tools, and guided check-ins for the anxiety, boredom, and isolation that no one warns you about.

⌚

Device sync

Connect Apple Health, Garmin, or Whoop to automatically pull sleep, heart rate, and noise level data into your recovery picture.

🩺

Share with your doctor

Export a clean symptom report to bring to your next appointment. Finally, something concrete to show your physician.

💬

Community forum

Athletes, non-athletes, long-haulers. Real people, real experiences. Because knowing others have been here matters.

⚡

Baseline brain test

Take a quick cognitive test before a concussion. If you're ever injured, recovery is measured against your personal normal — not an average.

How it works

Simple by design

Concussion recovery shouldn't be another thing that strains your brain.

1

Log daily

30-second voice or tap check-in each morning. No long forms, no cognitive load.

2

Get your focus

One clear activity or rest recommendation for the day, tailored to your symptom score.

3

See progress

Watch your recovery score rise over time. The visual proof your brain is healing.

4

Share & advance

Export your data, show your doctor, and advance through the return-to-activity stages.

Pricing

One price. Honest.

Concussions last weeks — not years. We don't charge a monthly subscription for something you need for 6 weeks.
